title: centaurea goerkii
intro: Centaurea goerkii, also known as Tyrlaching, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea goerkii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Centaurea goerkii can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
